articles.title: WHO declares Ebola outbreak in DR Congo an international emergency
articles.summary: The agency added that the outbreak, with around 246 cases and 80 deaths, does not meet the criteria of pandemic emergency.

articles.title: How worrying is the Ebola outbreak in DR Congo?
articles.summary: An outbreak in DR Congo has been declared a health emergency, with almost 250 suspected cases reported.

articles.title: Large-scale Ukrainian drone attack kills three in Moscow region, says Russia
articles.summary: Ukraine's president says the strikes are a "justified" response to deadly Russian attacks on Ukrainian cities.

articles.title: UAE reports strike near Abu Dhabi nuclear power plant
articles.summary: The country is investigating the source of the strike, which it calls a "dangerous escalation".

articles.title: Man drives car into pedestrians in Italy, injuring eight
articles.summary: Eight people were injured, four seriously, before passers-by gave chase and stopped the man.

articles.title: Hezbollah drone strike videos show evolving tactics against Israel
articles.summary: BBC Verify has examined dozens of videos of fibre-optic drone attacks carried out by the Lebanese armed group.

articles.title: Taiwan insists it is independent after Trump warning
articles.summary: Fresh from his summit in Beijing, the US president warned against a formal declaration of independence by the island.

articles.title: Trump-backed challenger defeats Republican senator who voted to convict president
articles.summary: Trump threw his full support behind Julia Letlow in Louisiana's high-stakes contest, branding the incumbent "disloyal".

articles.title: Canadian from hantavirus-hit cruise ship tests positive
articles.summary: The individual is one of four former passengers on the MV Hondius isolating on Vancouver Island, British Columbia.

articles.title: Rescue diver dies during search for bodies of Italians who drowned in Maldives caves
articles.summary: Staff Sgt Mohamed Mahdhee died while diving in the search-and-rescue operation, the Maldives government tells the BBC.
